11.description: Added doc = false to [[bin]] in motif_debug_cli/Cargo.toml. Issue #11 closed by maintainer (completed).

workspace_deps.description: Populated [workspace.dependencies] with shared external + internal crates; all 5 workspace members migrated to workspace = true; motif_test migrated to workspace package metadata.

contributing_docs.description: Added CONTRIBUTING.md with prerequisites, project layout, building, testing (TDD philosophy), code style, debug CLI, spool, and PR submission guide.

checkbox_element.description: Implemented Checkbox element in motif_core/src/elements/checkbox.rs with builder API, hit testing, checked/unchecked quads, hover/press visual state, and 9 unit tests. Resolves p3 TODO 'Checkbox element' from spool elements stream.

text_input_element.description: Implemented TextInput element in motif_core/src/elements/text_input.rs with builder API, placeholder, focused/unfocused border, cursor rendering, UTF-8 cursor snapping, and 10 unit tests. Resolves p2 TODO 'Text input element' from spool elements stream.

todomvc_example.description: Implemented TodoMVC example in crates/motif/examples/todomvc.rs (~700 lines). Text input, checkbox toggle, hover-reveal delete, All/Active/Completed filter tabs, items-remaining count, clear-completed button. Resolves p1/p2 TODOs from spool todomvc stream. Uses raw DrawContext/HitTree/InputState API; no dependency on draft Checkbox/TextInput PRs.

element_list_debug.description: Added element.list debug command: flat HitTree dump (id, bounds, z_index). Adds update_hit_tree() to DebugServer, HitEntryInfo to snapshot.rs, CLI formatter. Stepping stone toward 'Query element tree (p1)' devtools TODO.

dep_audit.notes: Ran cargo metadata on Linux. All 5 workspace packages resolve correctly. [workspace.dependencies] is empty (PR #16 addresses). Individual crates use reasonable semver pins. Could not run cargo outdated (macOS required for full Metal build). Feature branches (feature/devtools, feature/focus-system, feature/hot-reload, feature/input-system, feature/quad-borders) exist on GitHub but predate current main.

devtools_investigation.findings: scene.quads, scene.text_runs, input.state, debug.draw_quad, debug.clear, screenshot all already implemented in server.rs. 'Query element tree (p1)' TODO is NOT fully implemented. PR #21 adds element.list (flat HitTree dump: id, bounds, z_index). Full element tree query still needs: parent-child tracking in DrawContext, component type names in HitEntry. Could implement 'element.inspect <id>' in a future run once #21 lands.

2026-03-04.pr16: pending (0 checks - macOS CI not yet scheduled)
2026-03-04.pr20: pending (0 checks - macOS CI not yet scheduled)
2026-03-04.notes: CI requires macOS for clippy/test. fmt and doc run on ubuntu-latest. PRs #16-#21 all created 2026-03-04.

notes: Run 9 (22654530783): Task 10 — implemented element.list debug command (PR #21). Uses flat HitTree dump as stepping stone toward Query element tree (p1). Task 11 — updated Monthly Activity Summary with new PR. PRs #16-#21 all open draft. Next: (a) On 2026-03-18 nudge PRs if not reviewed. (b) After element.list merges, consider 'element.inspect <id>' for richer per-element info. (c) Focus management (p2) is good candidate after TextInput/Checkbox PRs merge. (d) Hot reload boundary design (p1) not yet started.
